title: Long-term outcomes of trabeculectomy versus canaloplasty in open-angle glaucoma -- an 11-year follow-up of the TVC study cohort
institution: Department of Ophthalmology, University Hospital Wuerzburg, Wuerzburg, Germany
study_type: Prospective follow-up of a randomized clinical trial

original_study.authors: Matlach J, Dhillon C, Hain J, Schlunck G, Grehn F, Klink T
original_study.title: Trabeculectomy versus canaloplasty (TVC study) in the treatment of patients with open-angle glaucoma: a prospective randomized clinical trial
